What is Python?: Python is a high-level programming language used for web development, AI, and data science.
What is AI?: AI (Artificial Intelligence) is the ability of machines to think and learn like humans.
What is Machine Learning?: Machine Learning is a branch of AI that allows systems to learn from data.
What is Deep Learning?: Deep Learning is a subset of ML that uses neural networks.
What is NLP?: NLP stands for Natural Language Processing which helps computers understand human language.
What is Data Science?: Data Science is the study of data to extract meaningful insights.
What is Flask?: Flask is a lightweight Python web framework.
What is Django?: Django is a full-stack Python web framework.
What is HTML?: HTML is used to structure web pages.
What is CSS?: CSS is used to style web pages.
What is JavaScript?: JavaScript is used to make web pages interactive.
What is API?: API allows communication between different software systems.
What is REST API?: REST API is a web service that follows REST architecture.
What is JSON?: JSON is a lightweight data format used for data exchange.
What is SQL?: SQL is used to manage databases.
What is Database?: A database is a system to store and manage data.
What is MySQL?: MySQL is an open-source relational database.
What is Git?: Git is a version control system.
What is GitHub?: GitHub is a platform to host and manage Git repositories.
What is VS Code?: VS Code is a popular code editor.
What is Internet?: The Internet is a global network of computers.
What is Computer?: A computer is an electronic device that processes data.
What is RAM?: RAM is temporary memory used by computer.
What is CPU?: CPU is the brain of the computer.
What is OS?: Operating System manages computer hardware and software.
What is Windows?: Windows is an operating system by Microsoft.
What is Linux?: Linux is an open-source operating system.
What is Android?: Android is a mobile operating system.
What is iOS?: iOS is Apple's mobile operating system.
What is Cloud Computing?: Cloud computing provides computing services over the internet.
What is AWS?: AWS is Amazon's cloud computing platform.
What is Cyber Security?: Cyber security protects systems from digital attacks.
What is Encryption?: Encryption secures data by converting it into code.
What is Machine Vision?: Machine vision allows computers to interpret images.
What is Chatbot?: A chatbot is a software that simulates human conversation.
What is Automation?: Automation is the use of technology to perform tasks automatically.
What is Algorithm?: An algorithm is a step-by-step procedure to solve a problem.
What is Flowchart?: A flowchart is a diagram representing a process.
What is Programming?: Programming is writing instructions for computers.
What is Software?: Software is a set of programs used by computer.
What is Hardware?: Hardware is the physical parts of a computer.
What is Debugging?: Debugging is finding and fixing errors in code.
What is Compiler?: A compiler converts code into machine language.
What is Interpreter?: An interpreter executes code line by line.
What is IDE?: IDE is a software used for programming.
What is Machine Intelligence?: Machine intelligence is another term for AI systems.
What is Big Data?: Big Data refers to extremely large datasets.
What is Data Analysis?: Data analysis is the process of inspecting data.
What is UI?: UI is User Interface design of an application.
What is UX?: UX is User Experience of a system.
What is Frontend?: Frontend is the part of website users see.
What is Backend?: Backend is server-side logic of applications.
